title: Tebul Sign Language
summary: Tebul Sign Language (French: Langue des signes de Tebul) is a village sign language of the village of Uluban in the Dogon region of Mali, among speakers of Tebul Dogon.
text: Tebul Sign Language (French: Langue des signes de Tebul) is a village sign language of the village of Uluban in the Dogon region of Mali, among speakers of Tebul Dogon.
